query: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.open_id, up.day_master_element, up.day_pillar, up.favorable_elements, up.unfavorable_elements, up.birth_date FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_profiles up ON u.id = up.user_id ORDER BY u.id;
